caption: A screen recording captures a web browser window displaying a complex conceptual map on a dark background. The map consists of circular icons containing images, connected by curved blue lines. Legible labels within the map include "Food insecurity," "Healthy diets," and "Sustainable food systems." The browser's address bar shows the URL "deck.etude.app/food learning," and the tabs at the top include titles like "Truth & Learning by Systemenics" and "Future of Society by Systemenics." In the upper right corner of the browser window, a small video call overlay shows a man wearing a dark cap and glasses. The man remains stationary throughout the sequence, while the map on the main screen stays constant. The only change between the frames is the movement of a white mouse cursor, which glides across the dark background of the conceptual map.
